tasks.name: Plan doc
tasks.scope: Author docs/plans/2026-04-19-team-x-phase-5-m35-demo-hardening.md (186 lines). Mirrors M33/M34 plan-doc structural template. T0–T10 task breakdown covers all Phase 5 design §9 M35 deliverables.

tasks.name: Performance defaults pass + clamp audit
tasks.scope: Measurement pass (not optimization pass) across the 10 settings clamps documented in the M35 plan doc §4.2 table. Analyzer-shaped prompt (50 ticket.comment + 10 project.updated + 2 goal.progressChanged + 5 vault.fileAdded = 67 bounded events, truncated to the 2000-char MAX_EVENT_SUMMARY_CHARS cap) fired at local Ollama + llama3.1:8b (Q4_K_M, 4.9 GB). Evidence: cold 208563 ms, warm #1 66847 ms, warm #2 65872 ms; 2288 chars / 734 prompt_eval tokens / ~200 eval tokens; well-formed JSON response. Decision: all 10 defaults HELD — measurement justifies holding, not moving (66 s warm tick vs 120 s agentic_timeout_ms = 0.55× utilisation; 5-min copilot cadence vs 66 s tick = 4.5× headroom; 8000 token budget vs 1600 projected = 4× headroom). Full measurement block + per-clamp rationale table lives in apps/desktop/src/main/db/seed.ts header.
filesTouched: apps/desktop/src/main/db/seed.ts (+47 header comment lines, behavior untouched)

tasks.name: Cross-milestone E2E — RAG → NLU → agentic → planner → copilot
tasks.scope: NEW apps/desktop/e2e/phase-5-integration.spec.ts (495 lines). Single spec stitching the full Phase 5 stack in one Playwright session. Shipped scenario: (1) vault.upload + chat round-trip via CEO with __ECHO_TEXT__:<marker> sentinel fires work.completed → RagIndexer embeds the reply → rag.stats embedding count grows above baseline (the RagIndexer subscribes to work.completed + meeting.ended, not vault events — vault files are retrieved through FTS5 at agent-turn time rather than pre-indexed; the vault.upload IPC is still asserted in the same session as an independent Phase 4 surface). (2) Cmd+K 'what is my team doing right now' → canned classifier complex_request → canned agentic provider plan → query_employees → answer with 'Team currently has' text. (3) Cmd+K 'decompose the frontend redesign into tickets' → amber write-side gate → Confirm → decompose_project + delegate_subtask + answer with 'Decomposed the frontend redesign' text. (4) copilot.configure manual tick → insightsGenerated ≥ 1. (5) Toolbar Sparkles toggle → sidebar + insight card + dismiss + copilot.dismissed on events table (invariant #11) + ask-input sentinel → system-flagged thread count ≥1. Regression guards inline: destructive gate ABSENT full session; write-side gate ONLY Step 3; Phase 5 badge verbatim. Runtime 3.7s (under ≤15s budget). Launched with TEAM_X_RAG_TEST=1 + NODE_ENV=test. Zero production-code changes. Zero new canned-seam entries — reused existing keys + __ECHO_AGENT__: sentinel path.

tasks.name: Observability polish — Audit view chip coverage audit
tasks.scope: Phase 5 added 15 new event types; AuditView previously shipped chips for only 7 (M30 command.executed + M32 T6 planner chips). T3 chips the remaining 10 (rag.index.indexed, rag.index.reindexed, rag.index.removed, agent.step, agentic.completed, agentic.failed, copilot.analyzed, copilot.insight, copilot.dismissed, copilot.expired) with semantic-color-paired-with-text-label a11y contract + aria-label carrying the literal event-type name + data-event-type stable E2E selector surface. Payload-aware row-summary formatters surface the most useful payload field per type (agent.step → kind + stepIndex + runId slice; copilot.analyzed → reason + counts + durationMs; rag.index.* → sourceKind + sourceId slice + chunkCount; etc.). Hard 140-char summary cap via clampSummary. NEW `audit-event-chip-helpers.ts` pure-helper module split from the component `.tsx` so vitest resolves without `@/` alias cascade through Badge — mirrors the existing step-card-narrow.ts + step-card.tsx convention. Three representative event types pinned per acceptance #3 (rag.index.indexed / agent.step / copilot.analyzed) plus M32 T6 planner regression guards (plan.proposed + task.delegated) plus cross-cutting defaults. rag.index.* chips land defensively — the bus events are aspirational per CLAUDE.md's bus-event table but NOT currently emitted by rag-indexer.ts (verified via grep of lines 78, 88 — indexer only handles work.completed + meeting.ended and writes directly via ragService.indexSource without a bus emit).

Verification recipe at T10: (1) Node ABI rebuild, (2) pnpm test → ~1145, (3) pnpm typecheck → clean, (4) pnpm lint → 0 errors / ≤24 warnings, (5) Electron ABI rebuild, (6) pnpm -F @team-x/desktop test:e2e → 11/12 in ≤35s, (7) pnpm -F @team-x/desktop build, (8) pnpm dist:win smoke-launch against release/1.1.0/ installer.

Risk watch: (a) T1 measurement may justify no default changes — that is a valid outcome and T1 ships with unchanged defaults + evidence in comments. (b) T2 E2E may exceed 15s budget — that signals a canned seam doing real work; diagnose, do not widen the budget. (c) T8 version bump must also audit for any hardcoded '1.0.0' outside package.json (docs, comments, strings) — the pnpm dist:win smoke-launch verifies the installer version externally.
